query:
SELECT id, title, lessonOrder, LENGTH(content) as content_length 
FROM lessons 
WHERE courseId = 180001 
ORDER BY lessonOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT id, title, lessonOrder, LENGTH(content) as content_length 
FROM lessons 
WHERE courseId = 180001 
ORDER BY lessonOrder;
